name: Eternal Prison
description:
VORE VORE VORE UNBIRTH ENTRAPMENT VORE VORE VORE FOX FOX

saw a story like ts one time (this one https://aryion.com/g4/view/868532) and i really liked the premise of an anthro being able to shift organs and expand the tunnel of their cunt to take in more and more of the victim, their body hidden underneath muscular thick layers, forced to be entrapped squeezed and compressed because of their crimes…

the image really doesnt have much to do with the idea, but i needed an image and it was too hyper specific for me to find one

also the woman is like the size of a building, i am not making her that tall, maybe just 16ft is good enough

art by utta on twitter https://x.com/utterangle/media?lang=en
creator: methen
